target_transform: log1p during training, expm1 during prediction

split_strategy.purpose: Train set learns model patterns, validation selects ensemble weights, test set reports final unbiased performance.

ensemble.strategy: validation-optimized weighted average of CatBoost, LightGBM, and XGBoost log-price predictions

condition_handling.reason: The uploaded dataset does not contain a verified inspection-condition label.
condition_handling.solution: Monotonic condition calibration multiplier applied post-prediction.

imputation_strategy.reason: Median is robust for right-skewed used-car features such as price, odometer reading, engine capacity, and mileage because extreme outliers can distort the mean.

notes: Model predicts base market value from the uploaded used-car dataset.
Final displayed market value is condition-calibrated to ensure consistent dealer logic.
Quote, risk, profit, urgency, and BUY/NEGOTIATE/REJECT are calculated by the backend decision engine.
Computer vision is kept on hold; manual condition input is used for the final prototype.
ex_showroom_price and depreciation_ratio excluded (target leakage without real column).
v2.3 — segmented models by price bracket (budget/mid/premium).
